default.title: LeClap — Cinematic Video Composer in Your Browser
default.description: Create cinematic videos from templates right in your browser. LeClap runs client-side with WebAssembly and FFmpeg — no uploads, no servers, no limits.

studio.title: Studio
studio.description: Pick a template and compose your video right in the browser — trim, crop, add music, and export with on-device FFmpeg. No uploads, no servers.

about.title: About
about.description: LeClap is an open, browser-based cinematic video composer powered by WebAssembly and FFmpeg. Learn what it is and who built it.

legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.description: Who publishes and hosts LeClap — the open, browser-based cinematic video composer.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: LeClap processes your media on your device. No uploads, no accounts, no tracking — here is exactly how your privacy is handled.
